gate_verdict.reason: All A/B/C targets cleared. T5 residual = 0/250 (first time). adm_top1 0.7905 → 0.8379 (+4.74pp). cov_r5 0.9091 → 0.9368 (+2.77pp). PDF practical top5 coverage 95.6% → 100.0%. Per-case top1 PASS→FAIL flips across A+B+C = 0.

guards_upgraded_or_added: Mitsunobu: chiral_alcohol→chiral_ester stereo-flip boost 1.55× (SN2 inversion hallmark)
NHK: strict vinyl_halide consumed + single OH gained boost 1.55×
Chugaev: xanthate + alkene boost strengthened to 1.55×
Passerini: 3-CR strict match boost strengthened to 1.45×
Amadori: glycoside_n + keto_amino_open SMARTS boost 1.55× (replaces weak legacy guard)
BV: anti-Passerini penalty when isocyanide present (0.30×)
VCP-Cyclopentene: anti-Chugaev penalty when xanthate present (0.35×)

fixes: Beckmann Rearrangement (id 1435): 'O=NC=C1CCCCC1' (nitroso-alkene) → 'ON=C1CCCCC1' (cyclohexanone oxime). Correct oxime SMARTS now matches.
Stille Cross-Coupling (id 1303): tBu → methylstannane C[Sn](CCCC)(CCCC)CCCC. Sn feature now fires.
bucket_B_bench_data_defect_fixes.additional_code_change: evidence_search.py Stille guard: added positive boost 1.55× when Sn + (aryl or vinyl or alkyl) halide present.

metrics_delta_B.note: Stille 1303 retrieval-level gap persists: CHEMLENS fingerprint index doesn't have Sn entries in Stille DB rows, so no Stille candidate surfaces in top5. DB-level fix (updating reactant_smiles in reaction_extracts table) would resolve. Stille 1304 already at h@5 PASS.

bucket_C_query_time_reagent_text.description: Wired user-supplied reagent_text through the query API so the Phase 5 reagent-family bonus fires not just on candidate's DB reagents_text but also on the user's explicit query reagent_text — stronger confidence (1.55× boost).
files_modified: app/evidence_search.py — Added reagent_text field to StructureEvidenceRequest + _reagent_query_family_match() function + per-candidate boost in _finalize_results
benchmark_builder.py — emits case.reagent_text from DB reaction_extracts.reagents_text
run_family_admission_benchmark.py / run_corpus_coverage_benchmark.py / run_named_reaction_benchmark_small.py — forward case.reagent_text to StructureEvidenceRequest

bucket_C_iter2_dmso_siblings.description: Added Pfitzner-Moffatt and Parikh-Doering entries to _REAGENT_FAMILY_KEYWORDS so DMSO-oxidation siblings get disambiguated by their own activator (Moffatt=DCC, Parikh-Doering=SO3).
